# AUTO-GENERATED by split_acceptance_tests.py
# Each original test function was split into one function per top-level
# assertion so pytest reports per-check pass/fail counts.
def test_mapper_erases_typevarlike_to_upper_bound_including_paramspec__a1() -> None:
    source = open('/workspace/mypyc/irbuild/mapper.py', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    assert 'elif isinstance(typ, ParamSpecType):' not in source, 'ParamSpecType should not be special-cased to always map to object; it should be erased to its upper_bound like other TypeVar-like types.'

def test_mapper_erases_typevarlike_to_upper_bound_including_paramspec__a2() -> None:
    source = open('/workspace/mypyc/irbuild/mapper.py', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    assert 'TypeVarLikeType' in source, 'Mapper.type_to_rtype should use TypeVarLikeType to cover both TypeVarType and ParamSpecType (and other typevar-like types).'

def test_mapper_erases_typevarlike_to_upper_bound_including_paramspec__a3() -> None:
    source = open('/workspace/mypyc/irbuild/mapper.py', 'r', encoding='utf-8').read()
    assert 'return self.type_to_rtype(typ.upper_bound)' in source, 'Mapper.type_to_rtype should erase TypeVarLikeType (including ParamSpecType) to its upper_bound by delegating to self.type_to_rtype(typ.upper_bound).'
